calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for and with Myriette Bradley (Administrator). Marcia Duncan, Monica Moore, Decil duncan, Kevin Duncan, Mayra Carr, Rory Duncan (Grandchildren/Great-grandchildren) also present.

The Court stated that it read all of the declarations and what Counsel is requesting but it is not what the will says, and that the will is quite clear and there is no ambiguity with it. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio and various family members spoke of conversations they had with the Decedent regarding her will, her wishes and her position that the Parents provide for the unborn grandchildren. The Petition to Determine Distribution Rights was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio.

The Court stated that it did not receive a declaration from Reynaldo Duncan (relative who had the original will in his car which was towed) regarding the lost will. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that she filed two declarations from Myriette Bradley and Marcia Duncan, and that Reynaldo Duncan was in Las Vegas and a bit estranged. The Court also noted that there was no waiver from Joseph O'Sullivan. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that Mr. O'Sullivan is not a beneficiary. The Petition for Probate was taken under submission for the Court to address the issue of bond and to modify the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
